## Epic 7 — GM Tools (#81)

**Dependency:** #80
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Write chapter 18 — Advancement as a complete chapter.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Gaining Levels** — How and when characters advance
2. **Development Points** — Earning and spending DP
3. **Class Progression** — Level tables for all 8 classes
4. **Group Reputation** — Party renown, benefits, NPC reactions
5. **Titles** — Honorifics and their mechanical effects
6. **Milestone Advancement** — Story-driven alternative to XP/levels
7. **Reveling** — (from original PDF) throwing legendary parties to boost renown
8. **Retirement & Legacy** — Endgame options

### Tasks
- [ ] Write advancement rules
- [ ] Create class progression tables (8 classes × 20 levels)
- [ ] Write group reputation system
- [ ] Write title system
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: classes (ch05), skills (ch07)
